title: Blurr
subTitle: Suspicious about the circumstances surrounding her twin sister's death, a woman with progressive blindness searches for answers that eventually lead her down a dangerous path.

title: Joggers' Park
subTitle: Jyotin Chatterjee, a former judge, falls for Jenny, a young and independent woman. However, things take a turn when his family scrutinises their relationship.

title: Chakravyuh
subTitle: Kabir infiltrates a Maoist organisation to help Adil Khan, who is a decorated police officer and his friend. As he gets deeper into the organisation, Kabir starts sympathising with the group's plight and starts having second thoughts.

title: Jail
subTitle: A false drug accusation by a friend destroys Parag's life. He struggles through prison, clinging to hope for legal assistance to prove his innocence.

title: Daddy
subTitle: Arun Gawli rises from poverty and becomes one of India's most notable gangsters. However, hungry for more power and influence, he launches a career in politics.

title: Sarkar 3
subTitle: Determined to protect public interest and his own authority, Sarkar finds himself locked in a cat-and-mouse game with his adversaries, both external and internal.

title: Attack
subTitle: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

title: Bastar: The Naxal Story
subTitle: A government official grapples with the uproar of leftist extremism in Bastar that has claimed thousands of lives and drained the country's financial resources.

title: Manmarziyaan
subTitle: A young, free-spirited woman is torn between two very different men and must decide who to marry. One is an immature, part-time DJ, while the other is a mature and responsible banker.

title: Omerta
subTitle: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

title: Rehnaa Hai Terre Dil Mein
subTitle: Maddy has seven days to win Reena's affections before she finds out that he is not Rajeev, the childhood friend and prospective fiance she has been expecting.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Tigers : Can a Salesman be a Hero
subTitle: Ayan, a pharmaceutical salesman, decides to stand against his company after discovering that their new baby formula is responsible for the death of many babies..

title: Turtle
subTitle: Ramkaran tirelessly churns the dry earth of a village in Rajasthan for water. Meanwhile, the villagers participate in desperate measures to satisfy their thirst.

title: Mere Pyare Prime Minister
subTitle: After his mother is raped one night, Kannu, an eight-year-old boy, writes a letter to the prime minister of India and embarks on a journey from Mumbai to Delhi with his two friends.

title: Operation Romeo
subTitle: A young man and a woman in love head out during the nocturnal hours. However, chaos ensues when they meet two strangers on their way.

title: Poorna
subTitle: Poorna Malavath, a 13-year-old girl from Telangana, becomes the youngest female in history to climb and reach the summit of Mount Everest.

title: Zero
subTitle: A vertically-challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life personality discovers his life's purpose through his relationships with two wildly different women.

title: The Kashmir Files
subTitle: A young college student sets out to uncover the truth behind his parents' brutal killings in Kashmir, leading him to a web of lies and conspiracies.

title: Gully Boy
subTitle: The life of an underdog rapper from Dharavi who struggles to express his views on social issues through rapping, changes completely after he bumps into Shrikant alias MC Sher.

title: Swatantra Veer Savarkar
subTitle: After witnessing the tyranny of Britishers at a very young age, Vinayak Damodar Savarkar joins the struggle for India's freedom and faces severe incidents in his life.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
subTitle: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: The Accidental Prime Minister
subTitle: Amidst the political upheaval, Dr Manmohan Singh, an Indian economist, faces several challenges during his tenure as the Prime Minister of India.

title: The Accidental Prime Minister
subTitle: Amidst the political upheaval, Dr Manmohan Singh, an Indian economist, faces several challenges during his tenure as the Prime Minister of India.

title: Welcome to New York
subTitle: A recovery agent and a designer become part of a big Bollywood event in New York, where chaos ensues, changing their lives forever.

title: Buddha in a Traffic Jam
subTitle: A management student's social media success unexpectedly pulls him into a dangerous clash of idealogies, where trust breaks down and agendas collide within academic walls.

title: Kites
subTitle: Jay, a dance instructor, falls in love with Tony's fiancee. They make their daring escape and get married, but Tony is determined to track them down.

title: Footfairy
subTitle: A CBI officer investigates a string of gruesome murders committed by a serial killer with a foot fetish. However, things take an ugly turn when he gets close to catching the killer.

title: Badhaai Do
subTitle: After being pestered to get married, a closeted gay cop decides to enter a marriage of convenience with a lesbian woman to appease his family.

title: Firaaq
subTitle: In the aftermath of Gujarat's violent 2002 riots, victims find their lives changed forever and reel from the deep impact the upheaval left on them.

title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
subTitle: In the small-town of Bareilly, a free-spirited Bitti hates that she is being pressured into getting married. But when she reads a book that reflects her life, she sets out to find its author.

title: Gaami
subTitle: Shankar, a reclusive man, embarks on an adventure to the Himalayas to find a cure for a rare human condition. However, things get complicated when his past unfolds.

title: Toofaan
subTitle: Aziz Ali, an orphan who works for a thug, meets Ananya, who encourages him to pursue his passion for boxing. However, one wrong decision costs him his career.

title: Darlings
subTitle: Badru desperately wishes her abusive husband mends his ill-treatment of her. However, when her situation worsens, Badru takes matters into her own hands.

title: The Tashkent Files
subTitle: Following the mysterious death of India's second prime minister, Lal Bahadur Shastri, a team launches a probe into the conspiracy of it being an assassination.
